title: ciliaria vespertina
intro: Ciliaria vespertina, also known as Night-scented Currant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Grossulariaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ciliaria vespertina include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating digestive issues due to its antiseptic properties. Ciliaria vespertina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
